topic: Melatonin: not just for sleep, but cellular repair
caption: Did you know melatonin is more than just a sleep hormone? 🌙 It plays a crucial role in cellular repair and protection. 💡 Learn how melatonin works and how you can boost its production naturally. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏 #Melatonin #SleepHormone #CellularRepair #NaturalHealth #Wellness #HealthTips #ScienceBacked
